name: MikroTik Radome Cover Kit
title: MikroTik Radome Cover Kit
short_description: Radome Cover for Mikrotik mANT 30dBi parabolic antennas
description: The MikroTik Radome Cover Kit (MTRADC) is specifically designed for MikroTik mANT 30dBi parabolic antennas, providing enhanced performance, durability, and a professional finish. By reducing wind load, the radome ensures greater stability and reliability in demanding outdoor conditions. The device withstands wind speeds of up to 125 mph, with a load of up to 50 kg at 40 m/s and 28 kg at 30 m/s. It protects the antenna feed from environmental elements such as snow, rain, dust, and UV exposure, helping extend the operational lifespan of your equipment while minimizing signal fluctuations. In addition to its functional benefits, the cover improves the overall appearance of large parabolic antennas, making them less obtrusive in both residential and commercial settings. Installation is quick and simple, requiring no special tools or advanced technical skills. Whether deployed in urban, rural, or coastal environments, the MikroTik Radome Cover Kit offers a cost-effective solution to maintain consistent signal quality and long-term protection for your mANT 30dBi antennas.
